column1: # Every row binds to exactly one `accounting-branch: <branch_id>` source marker.
# TC-RESOURCEACCOUNT-080 runs this suite under xtrace and proves covered marker
# lines executed; an uncovered marker executing is a fail-on-coverage-growth
# tripwire that requires promoting the row and naming its test.
B014|covered|TC-RESOURCEACCOUNT-027|record tuple does not hash to filename identity
B022|uncovered|-|start replays an existing valid record
B028|uncovered|-|usage commit rejects corrupt existing record
B042|uncovered|-|review-side started record is not reconciled
B050|covered|TC-RESOURCEACCOUNT-026|query record read failure is unavailable
B058|covered|TC-RESOURCEACCOUNT-025|query projection write failure is unavailable
B065|covered|TC-RESOURCEACCOUNT-028|identical unknown replay succeeds after durability confirmation
B068|covered|TC-RESOURCEACCOUNT-019|full-scan token sum exceeds exact supported range
B069|covered|TC-RESOURCEACCOUNT-031|query scan enters usage-committed case arm
B070|covered|TC-RESOURCEACCOUNT-020|query scan enters started case arm
B071|covered|TC-RESOURCEACCOUNT-021|query scan enters usage-unknown case arm
B072|uncovered|-|query scan defensive unknown-state case arm
